app.title: Clue solver
app.description: Track a game of Clue and watch the solver narrow the case file down to one suspect, one weapon, and one room.

splash.title: Welcome to the Clue solver
splash.description: Learn what this solver does for you, and start playing.

about.title: More than process of elimination
about.motivation: Every suggestion leaks information. Keeping track of who must hold what gets hard fast — too much to do in your head.
about.videoCallout: This solver does the bookkeeping for you. It finds clues you'd miss and teaches the strategy as you play. Watch the kickoff video to learn the logic — so you can be the best detective in the room.

toolbar.newGameConfirm: Start a new game? This will clear all players, cards, known hands, and suggestions.

setup.title: Game setup
setup.description: Set up your game: the card pack, the player names, hand sizes, and mark the cards you were dealt. Once you are ready, start playing.
setup.loadCardSetConfirm: Loading a card pack will discard your current hand sizes, known cards, and suggestions. Continue?
setup.saveAsCardPackTitle: Save the current cards as a reusable card pack
setup.saveAsCardPackPrompt: Save this card pack. Name it:
setup.shareSetupTitle: Share this game setup (card pack + players) with a friend
setup.handSizeMismatch: Hand sizes total {total} {total, plural, one {card} other {cards}}; should total {expected} after the {caseFileCount} case-file cards.
setup.removePlayerConfirm: Remove {player}? Any known cards they own and suggestions involving them will be cleared.
setup.removeCardConfirm: Remove {card}? Known-card marks and suggestions referencing this card will be cleared.
setup.removeCategoryConfirm: Remove {name}? Known-card marks and suggestions referencing its cards will be cleared.
setup.removeCategoryMin: At least one category is required
setup.removeCardMin: At least one card per category is required

deduce.title: Deduction grid
deduce.footnoteLine: Candidate for suggestion {labels} — refuter's unseen card could be here.

initial-known-card.headline: Given
initial-known-card.detail: You marked that {cellPlayer} {value, select, Y {owns} other {doesn't own}} {cellCard}.

card-ownership.headline: Card ownership
card-ownership.detail: {value, select, Y {Each {card} has exactly one owner — every other owner was ruled out, so {cellPlayer} must own it.} other {{card} is already owned by someone else, so {cellPlayer} doesn't own it.}}

player-hand.headline: Hand size
player-hand.detail: {value, select, Y {{player}'s hand is a fixed size and their other cards are all ruled out, so {player} must own {cellCard}.} other {{player}'s hand is a fixed size and already full, so {player} can't also hold {cellCard}.}}

case-file-category.headline: Case file
case-file-category.detail: {value, select, Y {The case file holds exactly one {category} — the others are ruled out, so the answer is {cellCard}.} other {The case file holds exactly one {category}; another card in that category is the answer, so it isn't {cellCard}.}}

non-refuters.detailKnown: {cellPlayer} passed on {suggester}'s suggestion #{number}, so {cellPlayer} can't hold {cellCard}.
non-refuters.detailUnknown: {cellPlayer} passed on suggestion #{number}, so {cellPlayer} can't hold {cellCard}.

refuter-showed.detailKnown: {refuter} refuted suggestion #{number} by showing {seen}, so {cellPlayer} owns {cellCard}.
refuter-showed.detailUnknown: The refuter showed {cellCard} when refuting suggestion #{number}.

refuter-owns-one-of.detailKnown: {refuter} refuted {suggester}'s suggestion #{number} ({cardLabels}); the other two were ruled out, so {refuter} must own {cellCard}.
refuter-owns-one-of.detailUnknown: The refuter of suggestion #{number} owned one of the three cards; the other two were ruled out, so it must be {cellCard}.

disjoint-groups-hand-lock.headline: Disjoint groups
disjoint-groups-hand-lock.detail: {player} refuted {groupCount} suggestions ({suggestionNumbers}) whose cards don't overlap, accounting for every remaining card in {player}'s hand. So {cellPlayer} can't hold {cellCard}.

failed-accusation.detailKnown: {accuser}'s accusation #{number} ({cardLabels}) failed, so the case file isn't all three of those — and the other two are already pinned, so {cellCard} can't be in the case file either.
failed-accusation.detailUnknown: A failed accusation #{number} named {cellCard}; the other two cards in that accusation are already pinned to the case file, so {cellCard} can't be.

failed-accusation-pairwise.headline: Failed accusations
failed-accusation-pairwise.detail: {pinnedCardLabel} is in the case file, and accusations {accusationNumbers} together rule out every still-possible third card paired with {cellCard}. So {cellCard} can't be in the case file.

recommendations.oneGuessFromCasefile: Could pin down the casefile {category} in one guess.
recommendations.expectedReveal: Expected to reveal about {cellCount, plural, one {# checklist cell} other {# checklist cells}} on average.
recommendations.accuseNowBody: The case file is fully pinned: {cards}. Make the accusation to win the game.
recommendations.accuseNowLogTitle: Add this accusation to the failed-accusation log (only if it turns out to be wrong)
recommendations.nearlySolvedBody: Every category but {category} is pinned. Two candidates remain in {category} — one well-chosen suggestion narrows it to one.

suggestions.title: Suggestion log
suggestions.resolveContradictionFirst: Resolve the contradiction to see recommendations.
suggestions.nothingUseful: Nothing useful to ask — you've already narrowed everything down.
suggestions.priorKeyboardHint: ↑↓ navigate · Enter edit · ⌫ remove · Esc exit
suggestions.priorEmpty: No suggestions yet. Add one above.
suggestions.refutationLine: {status, select, refutedSeenPassed {refuted by {refuter} (showed {seen}) · passed: {passers}} refutedSeen {refuted by {refuter} (showed {seen})} refutedPassed {refuted by {refuter} · passed: {passers}} refuted {refuted by {refuter}} nobodyPassed {nobody could refute · passed: {passers}} other {nobody could refute}}
suggestions.anyCategoryNotInCaseFile: any {category} not in the case file
suggestions.scoreBreakdownDetails: {cells, plural, one {Roughly # checklist cell would be revealed by asking this.} other {Roughly # checklist cells would be revealed by asking this.}}
suggestions.pillErrorSeenCardNotSuggested: Shown card is not one of the suggested cards
suggestions.pillErrorSuggesterIsRefuter: Suggester cannot also be the refuter

accusations.addHelpText: Add a player's failed accusation. No point in logging successful accusations — they end the game!

contradictions.bannerHelp: Some of the information you provided doesn't add up
contradictions.conflictAlreadyNotOwns: But {player} is already known not to have {card}.
contradictions.conflictAlreadyOwns: But {player} is already known to have {card}.
contradictions.conflictNonRefuterAlreadyOwns: {player} passed on this suggestion, so they can't have {card} — but {player} is already known to have {card}.
contradictions.conflictRefuterShowedButCantOwn: {refuter} showed {card} to refute this suggestion, but {refuter} is already known not to have {card}.
contradictions.conflictRefuterOwnsOneOfImpossible: {refuter} refuted this suggestion without showing a card, so they must own one of {cards}. But {refuter} is already known not to have any of them.
contradictions.conflictFailedAccusationAllPinned: But the case file is already deduced to be {cards} — that accusation should have won.
contradictions.conflictCardNoPossibleOwner: But {card} has been ruled out for every possible owner.
contradictions.conflictHandSizeOverflow: But {player} would hold more than {handSize} cards.
contradictions.conflictHandSizeUnderflow: But {player} can't hold {handSize} cards if all of these are ruled out.
contradictions.conflictCaseFileCategoryConflict: But the case file's {category} is already accounted for.
contradictions.conflictCaseFileCategoryNoOption: But every card in the {category} category has been ruled out for the case file.

share.createDescriptionLead: Pick what to include. Friends with the link can import any combination of:
share.archetypePack: A custom card pack so a friend can play with the same set.
share.archetypeInProgress: A game in progress so a friend can pick up where you left off.
share.archetypeSolved: A finished mystery so a friend can see how you solved it.
share.signInTitle: Sign in or create account to share
share.signInDescription: Sharing a custom card pack saves it to your account so the receiver can pick it up. Sign in once and we'll continue your share.
share.signInToShare: Sign in or create account to share
share.requiresCardPackForPlayers: Card pack is required when sharing players
share.errorGeneric: Couldn't create the share. Try again in a moment.
share.importTitle: A friend shared a Clue Solver game
share.importDescription: Pick which parts of the share to import into your local game.
share.importModalDescription: Tick the sections you want. Anything left off won't touch your current game.

account.descriptionSignedOut: Sign in to sync your custom card packs across devices and keep games you've shared with friends.
account.descriptionSignedIn: Signed in. Your custom card packs sync to this account.
account.benefitSyncPacks: Custom card packs sync across every device you use.
account.benefitSharedGames: Game shares stay tied to your account so you can find them later.

installPrompt.title: Install Clue Solver
installPrompt.description: Add Clue Solver to your home screen for a faster, fuller experience.
installPrompt.benefitOffline: Works offline once installed — same deducer, no network needed.
installPrompt.benefitHomeScreen: Launches from your home screen with its own icon, no browser bar.
installPrompt.benefitFastLaunch: Cold-starts faster than a fresh tab.

cardPack.title: Pick a card pack
cardPack.body: Start with the Classic deck, swap to Master Detective, or roll your own and save it as a custom pack.

players.title: Add the players
players.body: Type each player's name. Use + Player for as many as you need — Clue traditionally has 3-6, but the solver scales to any size.

handSize.title: Set hand sizes
handSize.body: How many cards each player was dealt. The solver uses this to deduce who can't be holding which card.

knownCard.title: Mark cards you've seen
knownCard.body: Click a cell to record what you know about each (player, card) pair: Y if they hold it, N if you know they don't, blank if unknown.

overflow.title: Everything else lives here
overflow.body: The ⋯ menu has Game setup, Take tour, New game, About, and (after sign-in) your account.

start.title: Ready to play
start.body: Click Start playing to flip into Play mode. The deducer keeps running in the background as you log suggestions and disproofs.

cell.title: Each cell is a deduction
cell.body: Y means a player holds that card; N means they don't. The solver runs after every change and fills in everything it can derive.

caseFile.title: The case file
caseFile.body: When the solver narrows a category to a single suspect / weapon / room, the case-file column shows it — that's your accusation.

addForm.title: Add the first suggestion of the game to get started!
addForm.body: After adding, switch to the checklist to see updated deductions.

priorLog.title: All suggestions are logged here
priorLog.body: Every suggestion you log shows up here. Click any row to edit it later if you mis-typed something.

checklist.title: See updated deductions on the checklist
checklist.body: The solver re-runs after every suggestion — your next deduction may already be on the board.
